analysis_item.label: EBS Concurrent Program PL/SQL
analysis_item.original_input: CREATE OR REPLACE PROCEDURE xxap_invoice_sync(errbuf OUT VARCHAR2, retcode OUT NUMBER) IS BEGIN INSERT INTO xxap_audit_log(message_text, created_on) VALUES('SYNC START', SYSDATE); COMMIT; EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN retcode := 2; errbuf := SQLERRM; END;

primary_output.summary_oneliner: Basic Oracle E-Business Suite invoice synchronization procedure with minimal audit logging and error handling
primary_output.summary_complexity: Low - simple INSERT with basic exception handling
primary_output.summary_risk: Medium - commits within procedure and lacks proper error context
primary_output.functional_purpose: Initiates invoice synchronization process with audit trail logging for Oracle E-Business Suite AP module

side_effects: Commits transaction immediately, creates audit log entry

dataflow_steps: Insert sync start message into xxap_audit_log table
Handle exceptions by setting error code and message
